name: Hawks
signature: Trae Young is them. Always 7-seed energy.

name: Celtics
signature: Tatum + Brown + Jrue + Porzingis. The defending champs. Shooting variance is a vibe.

name: Nets
signature: The post-Big Three crater. Mikal Bridges era ended. They're picks and prayers now.

name: Hornets
signature: LaMelo Ball's tunnel fits run the franchise. The wins are bonus.

name: Bulls
signature: The Play-In Tournament's most loyal customer.

name: Cavaliers
signature: Donovan Mitchell's team. Garland and Mobley as the future.

name: Mavericks
signature: Luka and PJ. They went to the Finals. Then traded Luka. RIP.

name: Nuggets
signature: Jokic. The greatest passing big man ever. Calm, dominant, slightly bored.

name: Pistons
signature: The Cade Cunningham Renaissance. They were Cal Weaver in the Gap suit. Now they're Jacob.

name: Warriors
signature: Steph Curry forever. The dynasty in twilight.

name: Rockets
signature: Where KD ended up. Where Jabari Smith got rinsed in the burner. Sengun era.

name: Pacers
signature: Tyrese Haliburton's team. Ran past expectations every year. Pace, space, vibes.

name: Clippers
signature: The other LA team. Kawhi-PG nonexistence saga. James Harden is here now.

name: Lakers
signature: LeBron + AD + Bronny. The Kardashians of the league. JJ Redick from the podcast booth to the bench.

name: Grizzlies
signature: Ja Morant's redemption arc. Always one suspension away from chaos.

name: Heat
signature: Heat Culture. Pat Riley as the Vince Lombardi of NBA front offices.

name: Bucks
signature: Giannis is the franchise. Damian Lillard couldn't fix the roster around him.

name: Timberwolves
signature: Anthony Edwards as the heir to the league. Rudy Gobert as the meme.

name: Pelicans
signature: Zion's body in a perpetual hospital bed. Brandon Ingram contract drama.

name: Knicks
signature: Jalen Brunson era. KAT in NYC. The Garden is finally fun again.

name: Thunder
signature: SGA + Chet + Jalen. The young, scary best team in the league. The franchise that made KD a villain.

name: Magic
signature: Paolo Banchero's team. The Eastern Conference's quiet riser.

name: 76ers
signature: Embiid + Maxey + George. Always one foot in the trainer's room.

name: Suns
signature: Booker + Beal + KD. The most expensive disappointment in basketball. KD compared his coach to a dictator.

name: Trail Blazers
signature: Scoot Henderson + Shaedon Sharpe. The youth movement.

name: Kings
signature: Light the Beam. The most Sacramento-coded thing ever. De'Aaron Fox sniper era.

name: Spurs
signature: Wemby is the future. Pop in the wings. The most stately franchise in the league.

name: Raptors
signature: Scottie Barnes franchise. The post-Pascal era.

name: Jazz
signature: The tank job nobody respects. Lauri Markkanen as the trade chip.

name: Wizards
signature: Vibes are bad. Process is real. Bilal Coulibaly is the only good news.
